mnemonics.title: ADS - Phong Reflection
mnemonics.content: All Dogs Should: Remember the three reflection components in order: Ambient, Diffuse, Specular. Think of light bouncing off a dog in three ways - soft glow (ambient), matte fur (diffuse), shiny nose (specular).

mnemonics.title: Point Directional Spot
mnemonics.content: People Don't Stare: P-Point (light bulb), D-Directional (sun), S-Spot (flashlight). A simple phrase to recall all three CG light source types.

mnemonics.title: Shading Models
mnemonics.content: Fine Grained Pixels: FGP = Flat (1 color/polygon), Gouraud (color at vertices), Phong (color per pixel). The complexity increases from F to G to P - like going from coarse to fine detail.

mnemonics.title: Material Coefficients
mnemonics.content: Always Deliver Something Special: ka (Ambient), kd (Diffuse), ks (Specular), shininess (exponent). In order of increasing 'brightness' - ambient is weak, specular is sharp when shininess is high.
